name: Healthcare AI Startup
nl_description: I run a healthcare AI startup. Track FDA AI/ML medical device regulations, clinical decision support guidance, ONC HTI-1 transparency requirements, Medicare AI reimbursement policy, and any privacy/HIPAA AI rulemaking.

structured.notes: Healthcare AI startup focus: FDA AI/ML medical device (SaMD/PCCP) regs, clinical decision support guidance, ONC HTI-1 algorithm transparency, CMS/Medicare AI reimbursement, HHS/OCR HIPAA AI rulemaking.
